# Edge of Context: Practical AI Engineering

> A technical blog about AI/ML engineering — covering agentic systems, LLM infrastructure, search and ranking, fine-tuning, and practical tooling.

## Author

- Name: Viacheslav Dubrov
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/slavadubrov
- GitHub: https://github.com/slavadubrov

## Site

- URL: https://slavadubrov.github.io/
- RSS: https://slavadubrov.github.io/feed_rss_created.xml
